name: @harness/prompt-store
description: ISSUE-042 (C4 LYR/STO) — the four-layer prompt data model + the prompt_layers store with version-never-overwrite discipline. Insert-new-version-on-edit (never overwrite), mandatory non-empty change_reason, previous_version_id linkage, non-destructive rollback, version pinning at assembly, the four fixed layer types + fixed order, per-agent Layer-1 keying, the single-source-of-truth guard (no agents.system_prompt), the FR-4.LYR.004 required-element assembly halt hook, and PERM-prompt.edit/.view_history/.rollback default-deny gating. Offline build (port + in-memory fake); the live silo proof (RLS + version-discipline trigger firing) is the Stage-2 checkpoint capstone. Implements FR-4.LYR.001-004, FR-4.STO.001-006.
